channel.title: Sandra Signorella on LMI
channel.description: Recent content in Sandra Signorella on LMI

item.title: Preferential Azido Bridging Regulating The Structural Aspects Incobalt(Iii) And Copper(Ii)-Schiff Base Complexes: Syntheses,Magnetostructural Correlations And Catalytic Studies

Weak Interactions Modulating The Dimensionality In Supramoleculararchitectures In Three New Nickel(Ii)-Hydrazone Complexes,Magnetostructural Correlation, And Catalytic Potential For Epoxidationof Alkenes Under Phase Transfer Conditions
